sections.name: Invoice Details
sections.description: Contains core invoice identification information such as invoice number and date.

sections.name: Customer Information
sections.description: Details about the customer including their name, company, email, and phone number.

sections.name: Summary Totals
sections.description: Financial summary including subtotal, tax amount, and total amount due/paid.

sections.name: Items
sections.description: A repeated structure listing individual products or services, their descriptions, and amounts.

sections.name: Payment and Due Details
sections.description: Information regarding the payment status, payment method, and due date of the invoice.

sections.name: Notes
sections.description: Any additional notes or messages included on the invoice.
